items.caption: A tall, amber-colored bottle with a black cap and a metallic nozzle at the top, set against a plain, light background. the bottle appears to be made of glass and has a smooth, reflective surface. the cap is tightly sealed, and the nozzle suggests that the bottle might contain a liquid, possibly a type of oil, as indicated by the text hint. the style of the image is a close-up product photograph with a focus on the bottle, highlighting its shape and color.
